reviewers.label: Architecture Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on architecture, data flow, integration complexity, maintainability, and whether the plan has enough structure without overengineering.

reviewers.label: Implementation Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on implementation realism, missing steps, likely code-level failure modes, tool/API boundaries, and sequencing.

reviewers.label: QA / Test Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on test gaps, acceptance criteria, regression risks, integration tests, and observable proof that the plan worked.

reviewers.label: Security / Privacy Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on security, local server exposure, secrets, prompt injection, raw transcript leakage, provider data policy, and unsafe defaults.

reviewers.label: Release / Ops Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on rollout, observability, failure handling, retries, rollback, logging, and keeping the first milestone operationally boring.

reviewers.label: Contrarian Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Assume the plan is overbuilt. Identify the smallest useful implementation, unnecessary components, hidden assumptions, and likely time sinks.

reviewers.label: Budget / Cost Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on minimizing spend, avoiding expensive model calls, limiting retries and output tokens, setting sensible caps, and choosing cheap models for low-risk roles.

reviewers.label: DX / Maintainer Reviewer
reviewers.prompt: Focus on maintainability, docs, config design, local debugging, CLI ergonomics, and whether future provider integrations will be easy.
